fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Qoyod API key (sent as the API-KEY header). Stored encrypted.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: Target company. If empty, the first company on the site is used.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Transaction currency. If empty, the target company's currency is used.

fields.label: VAT Account
fields.description: Output/input VAT account. If empty, a leaf account whose name contains 'VAT' (else any Tax-type account) is used.

fields.label: Default VAT Rate (%)
fields.description: Fallback tax rate for taxed lines. Each line's own tax_percent wins when present (KSA default 15).

fields.label: Defaults
fields.description: Leave any of these empty to auto-detect a sensible value from this site (root group / leaf group / root territory).

fields.label: Root Item Group
fields.description: Parent for imported categories. Empty = the site's root Item Group.

fields.label: Account Suffix
fields.description: Appended to imported account names/numbers to keep them distinct from the native chart.

fields.label: Customer Group (Company)
fields.description: For customers with a tax number. Empty = a leaf Customer Group.

fields.label: Customer Group (Individual)
fields.description: For customers without a tax number. Empty = a leaf Customer Group.
